section.heading: Definitions
section.chapeau: For the purposes of this chapter—

paragraph.content: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of the Treasury.
The term “United States” includes the several States, the District of Columbia, and the Commonwealth of Puerto Rico.

paragraph.chapeau: The term “pre-Columbian monumental or architectural sculpture or mural” means—

subparagraph.chapeau: any stone carving or wall art which—

clause.content: is the product of a pre-Columbian Indian culture of Mexico, Central America, South America, or the Caribbean Islands;
was an immobile monument or architectural structure or was a part of, or affixed to, any such monument or structure; and
is subject to export control by the country of origin; or

subparagraph.content: any fragment or part of any stone carving or wall art described in subparagraph (A) of this paragraph.

paragraph.content: The term “country of origin”, as applied to any pre-Columbian monumental or architectural sculpture or mural, means the country where such sculpture or mural was first discovered.
